headline: Is Broadridge Financial Solutions (BR) Now Attractive After Recent Share Price Weakness?
summary: If you have been wondering whether Broadridge Financial Solutions is sensibly priced or starting to look interesting, you are in the right place for a clear look at what the current share price might imply. The stock last closed at US$196.88, with a 5.9% return over the past week, 3.6% over the past month, a 10.7% decline year to date, and a 17.0% decline over the last year, set against 51.1% and 47.9% returns over the past 3 and 5 years respectively.
